goal: 100% look&feel parity across deno, runts dev (HIR), and runts compile for all 89 Ink examples

phases.name: Phase 0: Unblock
phases.description: Fix the one thing preventing every path from running

phases.name: Phase 1: Structural Integrity
phases.description: Re-enable self-linting and split god files so the codebase can grow without collapsing

phases.name: Phase 2: HIR Runtime — The Core Engine
phases.description: Implement every missing Ink feature in the HIR interpreter; this is where 100% parity lives or dies

phases.name: Phase 3: Compile Path
phases.description: Fix the plugin boundary and make runts build produce faithful native binaries

phases.name: Phase 4: Verification & Hardening
phases.description: One harness, per-symbol diffs, and unit tests for every example

tasks.title: Fix quote_codegen.rs syntax error — unblock the build
tasks.acceptance: cargo build passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Re-enable build.rs linter and mechanically fix all 47 violations
tasks.acceptance: build.rs uncommented, cargo build passes, linter reports 0 violations

tasks.title: Split hir_runtime.rs into a proper interpreter crate
tasks.acceptance: No file >500 lines; eval_expr, eval_jsx, apply_box_prop each in own module; all existing tests pass

tasks.title: Consolidate 20+ shell scripts into ONE canonical parity harness
tasks.acceptance: Exactly one script (test_parity.sh) remains; parameterized for --env, --examples, --no-compile; old scripts deleted

tasks.title: Implement useState functional updater + useReducer in HIR runtime
tasks.acceptance: ink-counter example renders initial state with correct count value; setCount(c => c + 1) evaluates the arrow function

tasks.title: Implement real useInput / useApp / useStdin / useFocus stubs in HIR runtime
tasks.acceptance: All interactive examples render their initial static frame without crashing; useInput returns a no-op function instead of Undefined

tasks.title: Refactor apply_box_prop into a dispatch table or macro
tasks.acceptance: apply_box_prop reduced to ≤40 lines; all 89 examples still render correctly; complexity ≤10

tasks.title: Extract string/array stdlib polyfills into a reusable HIR stdlib module
tasks.acceptance: call_string_method and call_array_method live in src/interpreter/stdlib.rs; unit tests for every method (.map, .filter, .reduce, .slice, .trim, .toUpperCase, etc.)

tasks.title: Replace plugin JSON string boundary with typed HIR transfer
tasks.acceptance: Plugin::codegen_module takes &hir::Module instead of &str; zero serde_json round-trips inside the build pipeline

tasks.title: Make runts compile produce working binaries for every static example
tasks.acceptance: runts build --release on any static example produces a binary that exits 0 and prints the expected text to stdout

tasks.title: Add per-example HIR runtime unit tests for all 89 examples
tasks.acceptance: One Rust test per example that reads examples/*/tui/app.tsx, runs render_tsx, and asserts output contains expected strings; coverage ≥90%

tasks.title: Fix hardcoded 80×24 terminal dimensions in tests and HIR runtime
tasks.acceptance: TERMINAL_DEFAULT constant defined once; useWindowSize reads actual terminal size via crossterm or env var fallback

tasks.title: Delete dead code: runts-react crate, disabled imports, unused test script graveyard
tasks.acceptance: cargo build passes; no #[allow(dead_code)] required for deleted modules; workspace members only include compiling crates

known_blockers: quote_codegen.rs:609 unexpected closing delimiter — prevents cargo build
hir_runtime.rs eval_expr 356 lines / complexity 171 — cannot add features safely
apply_box_prop 309 lines / complexity 147 — adding any new CSS prop is copy-paste hell
useState functional updater not implemented — breaks ink-counter and any stateful example
20 shell scripts — violates EXECUTE.md 'single script' requirement
